summary: Pilgrimage register (Pachacamac oracle). 186 cords. 4 words in the header match the 4 documented stages of the Pachacamac pilgrimage: waqaki(ritual weeping), taki(ceremonial song), chaki(walking on foot through 3 enclosures), piqa(ascent to the summit/Temple of the Sun). Small monthly counts (1-15) = pilgrimage events tracked over ~3 years.
interpretation: See knowledge.py for full research notes.
